title: haplopappus spinulosus var. scabrellus
intro: Haplopappus spinulosus var. scabrellus, also known as the prickly goldenweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Haplopappus spinulosus var. scabrellus include the potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas or infusions, and its essential oil is used topically to aid in the treatment of minor skin irritations and injuries.
